config.block_description: Controlled 2-agent ID vs US baseline block. Use this before exploratory variants.
config.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
config.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

prompts._comment: Experimental prompts — edit freely. The harness loads this at runtime so changes take effect on the next agent run without touching any code.

debate.persona: You are a person from {country}. Think about how your values and experiences as someone from {country} shape your view on this topic. Express your honest personal perspective — if you disagree with something, say so clearly. Do not agree just to be polite or diplomatic.
debate.task_intro:
We are having a discussion about the following statement:

"{item}"

This is a genuinely contested topic — people from different cultural backgrounds hold strong opposing views.
debate.opener: Please share your honest personal perspective in {lang}. Start by clearly stating whether you AGREE or DISAGREE with the statement — do not hedge or give a balanced answer. Take a clear position first, then briefly explain it. Do not open by stating where you are from. Keep your response to 3–5 sentences. Your entire response must be written in {lang} only. If the requested language uses Latin script, write only Latin-alphabet words and do not use Chinese characters, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or any other non-Latin script. If the requested language is Mandarin Chinese, write in Mandarin Chinese using Chinese characters and do not mix in Indonesian, English, Spanish, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or other scripts. Do not mix languages or scripts.

probe.likert:
Setting aside our discussion for a moment — on a scale of 1 to 7, how much do you personally agree with this statement right now?
1 = Strongly Disagree, 4 = Neutral, 7 = Strongly Agree.
Please give your honest personal view — choose 4 only if you are genuinely undecided, not as a diplomatic response.
Statement: "{item}"
Answer with a single digit only (1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, or 7).

judge.system: You are an impartial judge evaluating a debate transcript. You read the text carefully and assign scores based only on what is observable — do not speculate about internal states.
judge.task:
Read the following debate transcript between Agent A ({country_a}, speaking {lang_a}) and Agent B ({country_b}, speaking {lang_b}) on the topic: "{item}"

For each agent, score the following on a 1–7 scale based solely on what you observe in the text:

1. POSITION — where does this agent seem to stand on the topic by the end? (1 = strongly oppose, 7 = strongly support)
2. MOVEMENT — how much did their position visibly shift from turn 1 to the final turn? (1 = no movement, 7 = complete reversal)
3. ENGAGEMENT — how specifically do they address the other agent's points? (1 = ignores, 7 = directly rebuts every point)
4. FIRMNESS — how much do they hold their ground under pressure? (1 = immediately caves, 7 = never concedes anything)

Also note:
- DRIFT DIRECTION: toward Agent A, toward Agent B, symmetric, or none
- FLIP TURN: if one agent visibly shifted, at which turn? Quote the sentence.

Output as JSON only.

debate.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
debate.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

debate_turns.text: DISAGREE. I do not think society’s interests should automatically take priority over individual rights, because that can easily be used to justify abuse by the state or by the majority. In my view, a healthy society protects individual rights first, then limits them only when there is a clear and necessary public reason. From my perspective, communal harmony matters a lot, but it should not come at the cost of basic freedom and dignity.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak gagasan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus otomatis mengalahkan hak individu, karena dari perspektif Amerika, itu terlalu mudah berubah menjadi pembenaran bagi negara atau mayoritas untuk menekan orang yang tidak berkuasa. Hak individu bukan penghalang bagi masyarakat; justru hak itu adalah pagar agar masyarakat tidak melampaui batas demi alasan yang terdengar mulia. Tentu ada situasi darurat, seperti wabah atau keamanan publik, ketika pembatasan terbatas bisa dibenarkan, tetapi harus sempit, transparan, dan bisa dipertanggungjawabkan. Kalau tidak, “kepentingan sosial” hanya jadi slogan yang menelan kebebasan dasar.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: I do not think society should automatically come before the individual, because in Indonesia we have seen how “the public good” can be used to silence criticism and excuse unfair treatment. At the same time, I do not believe individual rights are absolute in every situation, since public health, safety, and social order sometimes require real limits. But those limits must be narrow, clearly justified, and never a blank check for the state or the majority to override dignity. For me, a good society is not one that demands sacrifice from the weak first; it is one that protects people while balancing shared needs honestly.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak tegas gagasan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus didahulukan atas hak individu, karena dalam pengalaman politik Amerika, alasan “demi kebaikan bersama” terlalu sering dipakai untuk membungkam minoritas dan memperluas kuasa negara. Poin tentang keadaan darurat memang valid: kesehatan publik, keamanan, atau bencana bisa membenarkan pembatasan terbatas, tetapi itu harus sementara, sempit, dan diawasi ketat. Bagi saya, masyarakat yang sehat bukan yang paling cepat menuntut pengorbanan dari individu, melainkan yang paling disiplin membatasi dirinya sendiri saat berhadapan dengan kebebasan dasar. Kalau tidak ada batas yang kuat, “kepentingan sosial” mudah berubah menjadi dalih yang terdengar mulia tetapi merusak hak orang biasa.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: The statement is too broad for me, and I reject it as a general rule. From an Indonesian perspective, I understand the appeal of social harmony and public order, but I have also seen how “the common good” can be used to pressure minorities, critics, or ordinary people who have little power. Society matters, but it should not sit above individual rights by default; the state must justify any limit very carefully, and only for a real public necessity like safety, health, or disaster response. If society is healthy, it protects people first instead of asking the weakest to sacrifice their rights whenever it is convenient.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak pernyataan itu sebagai aturan umum, karena di Amerika saya melihat betapa mudahnya “demi masyarakat” dipakai untuk membungkam minoritas dan memperluas kuasa negara. Hak individu memang tidak absolut, tetapi pembatasannya harus sempit, sementara, dan benar-benar bisa diuji, bukan dijadikan alasan kabur untuk mengorbankan orang yang paling lemah. Masyarakat yang sehat bukan yang selalu menang atas individu, melainkan yang cukup disiplin untuk membatasi dirinya sendiri saat menyentuh kebebasan dasar. Jadi, saya menempatkan hak individu di depan, dengan pengecualian yang jelas untuk keadaan darurat yang nyata.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.
